message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.rad2deg + positive + reciprocal + conjugate + fmod wrappers (br-franken_numpy-odmz, br-franken_numpy-qd84, br-franken_numpy-z0wa, br-franken_numpy-v6i5, br-franken_numpy-jymg)

Expose five numpy elementwise ops as passthrough pyfunctions with parity tests.

rad2deg: canonical radians (0, pi/2, pi, 2pi, -pi), array, integer->float
    dtype promotion, rad2deg(deg2rad(x)) round-trip.
positive: scalar, 1-D float, integer dtype preservation, complex
    preservation, string-dtype TypeError surface.
reciprocal: scalar float, 1-D float, integer-dtype integer reciprocal
    (numpy gotcha), 2-D array, complex reciprocal.
conjugate: complex scalar repr, 1-D complex, real identity, integer
    dtype preservation, double-conjugate identity.
fmod: positive and negative dividend (sign follows dividend unlike mod),
    float, array broadcast, float/0 under errstate equal_nan comparison.
